attributes.Sql Query:

FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_GS_DATA STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_GS_DATA,
 (
 select SESSION_ID ,SESSION_CODE ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_GS_DATA
 minus
 select SESSION_ID ,SESSION_CODE ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXSCM_PL_GS_DATA
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.SESSION_ID = STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_GS_DATA.SESSION_ID and ACM.SESSION_CODE=STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_GS_DATA.SESSION_CODE and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_GS_DATA.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXSCM_PL_GS_DATA)
